pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Add explicit JAXB runtime dependency because it was removed from the JDK standard library in Java 11.
Add explicit javax.annotation-api dependency because java.annotation packages were removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.0.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modernize the framework stack.
Upgrade Hibernate from 4.3.6.Final to 5.4.25.Final to align with Spring Boot 2.x and Java 11 compatibility.
Upgrade Liquibase from 3.3.2 to 4.2.2 to ensure compatibility with newer Hibernate and Java versions.
Replace Joda-Time dependencies with Java 8+ java.time (JSR-310) support, as Joda-Time is deprecated and unnecessary in modern Java.
Switch Jackson Hibernate module from version 4 to version 5 to match the upgraded Hibernate version.
Replace legacy swagger-springmvc with Springfox to support OpenAPI 3.0 and modern Spring Boot versions.
Switch from Hibernate Ehcache integration to Hibernate JCache (JSR-107) to align with modern Spring Boot caching abstractions.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin with Java 11 source/target and annotation processors.
Configure Maven Enforcer Plugin to require Java 8-15 and specific Maven version.
Replace the legacy Yeoman/Grunt build process with Webpack managed by the frontend-maven-plugin to support modern frontend tooling.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed 'yeoman-maven-plugin' and added 'frontend-maven-plugin' executions for node/npm install and webpack builds.

package.json.general_idea: Replace the legacy Grunt/Bower/AngularJS stack with a modern Angular 11 and Webpack build pipeline.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, bower, karma; Added @angular/core, webpack, @angular/cli

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy BoneCP-style properties to standard HikariCP properties required by Spring Boot 2.x.
Replace the deprecated Hibernate H2 dialect with a custom fixed dialect to ensure compatibility with newer Hibernate versions.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver properties to HikariCP standard properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed 'type' to 'com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource' and moved cache properties under 'hikari.data-source-properties'.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update JPA configuration to use modern Hibernate dialect and remove deprecated naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed 'database-platform' and 'naming-strategy' properties, relying on auto-detection or newer defaults.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate cache configuration from root-level 'cache' properties to JHipster-specific 'jhipster.cache' namespace.
Replace legacy metrics exporters (Spark, Graphite) with Spring Boot Actuator Prometheus configuration.
Add JHipster-specific security and JWT configuration properties required for the new version.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added 'jhipster.security.authentication.jwt' block with base64-secret and validity settings.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x management properties with Spring Boot 2.x Actuator configuration structure.
Update custom async thread pool configuration to use standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from custom root level to standard Spring Boot 2.x spring.mail namespace.
Update JPA and Hibernate properties to align with Spring Boot 2.x and Hibernate 5.3+ defaults.
Replace legacy Swagger 2.x configuration with Springdoc OpenAPI 3.x compatible properties.
Remove deprecated Spring Security 4.x basic auth and Jolokia endpoint settings.
